subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants of God! Your letter, which was penned with the ink of divine love, brought joy to all hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده الهی نامه شما اثر خامه محبت الله بود سبب سرور دلها گردید هر
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
